changelog: Agency Powerup — ./tamerclaw powerup sets up a full software agency with CTO, CMO, and specialized agents. Includes 17 new shared modules, mobile store publishing pipeline, and Anthropic SDK integration.

history.changelog: Friendly API error messages — billing limits, rate limits, auth errors now show clean user-facing messages instead of raw JSON dumps
All Claude models online + Mac Mini compute tools
Claude Code Architecture Integration — tool-registry, command-registry, hooks, smart-memory-recall, feature-flags, echo-dedup, claude-engine
